---
name: Data Issue
about: Report unrealistic values, statistical issues, or data quality problems
title: "[DATA] "
labels: data
assignees: Varnasr
---

## Data Issue Description

Describe the data quality problem you've found.

## Which Generator

Which dataset generator produces the problematic data?

- [ ] Household Surveys
- [ ] RCTs
- [ ] Health
- [ ] Education
- [ ] Agriculture
- [ ] Labor Markets
- [ ] Microfinance
- [ ] Poverty Targeting
- [ ] Panel Data
- [ ] Market Prices

## Issue Type

- [ ] Unrealistic values (e.g., negative ages, impossible incomes)
- [ ] Statistical distribution issues (e.g., wrong skew, implausible variance)
- [ ] Missing expected correlations between variables
- [ ] Inconsistent units or scales
- [ ] Other

## Details

- **Variable(s) affected**:
- **Observed values/range**:
- **Expected values/range**:
- **Sample size used**:
- **Parameters used** (if any):

## Evidence

Include summary statistics, plots, or examples that demonstrate the issue.

## Suggested Fix

If you have ideas on how to make the generated data more realistic, describe them here. References to real-world data sources or papers are welcome.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the data issue here.
